name: KULR Technology Group, Inc.
business: KULR designs and builds advanced battery systems for autonomous platforms, digital infrastructure, e-mobility and Space sold as a product or delivered as service subscription. The Company addresses two primary constraints in electrification: thermal management and safety. KULR VIBE is a vibration-reduction technology designed to improve performance and reliability in high-speed and rotor-driven systems.

exposures.sentence: KULR designs and builds advanced battery systems for autonomous platforms, digital infrastructure, e-mobility and Space sold as a product or delivered as service subscription.
KULR ONE Guardian (K1G) Mission-specific, ruggedized battery systems engineered for military and defense applications.
KULR ONE Space (K1S) Flight-ready battery systems designed to meet the extreme demands of spacecraft, satellites and deep space missions.
KULR ONE Max (K1M) High-capacity battery systems for grid storage, UPS systems, data center backup, and large-scale power infrastructure.

KULR leveraged the KULR VIBE software, developed initially for helicopter balancing applications, to develop the Xero Vibe fan. The unprecedented low vibration levels of the Xero Vibe fan provide increased cooling efficiency, higher fan RPM, and decreased power consumption.
KULR ONE Air (K1A) Purpose-built aviation battery systems engineered for both unmanned and manned platforms, including UAS, tactical drones, and eVTOL aircraft.

KULR VIBE enables motors, rotating assemblies, and sensitive electronics to operate more smoothly and efficiently across a range of applications, including helicopters, drones, performance vehicles, wind turbines, and other electric and autonomous systems.
KULR ONE Space (K1S) Flight-ready battery systems designed to meet the extreme demands of spacecraft, satellites and deep space missions.
We have adopted bitcoin as one of our primary treasury reserve assets on an ongoing basis, subject to market conditions and our anticipated cash needs.
Significant disruptions of information technology systems, breaches of data security and other incidents could materially adversely affect our business, results of operations and financial condition.

tamClaims.claim: The space industry alone is projected to expand from $626.4 billion in 2025 to $1.01 trillion by 2034.
tamClaims.sentence: We believe technology in this sector is developing at increasing rates the space industry alone is projected to expand from $626.4 billion in 2025 to $1.01 trillion by 2034.
